name: X-Golf Medina
about: X-Golf Medina is a golf simulator venue offering 6 state-of-the-art indoor simulators. The facility provides a full-service experience including a lounge, bar, and food options, suitable for both individual play and group events. Pricing is per simulator, per hour, with rates varying by day and time, alongside membership options for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Ability to play famous golf courses from around the world
State-of-the-art indoor golf simulators offer a modern solution for year-round play and training

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a menu, food & beverage packages offered
Full liquor bar and craft beer available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site. The simulator also has its own auto-teeing system.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. For multiple players, it takes approximately one hour per person added.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages and is a family-friendly environment.
